# PHIL.156 ? Focus Over Coverage

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** resource_allocation
**Subcategory:** focus_over_coverage
**Domain:** RESOURCE_ALLOCATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Win decisively in chosen areas rather than being mediocre everywhere

## Application
Choose battles, concentrate resources, dominate niches, avoid spreading thin
